kdump_commandline_append.value: irqpoll maxcpus=1 reset_devices cgroup_disable=memory mce=off numa=off udev.children-max=2 panic=10 rootflags=nofail acpi_no_memhotplug transparent_hugepage=never nokaslr novmcoredd hest_disable srcutree.big_cpu_lim=0

kdump_commandline_remove.value: hugepages hugepagesz slub_debug quiet log_buf_len swiotlb

constant_value: sudo yum install -y wget jq git net-tools vim python3 tar
for i in $(nmcli device | grep unmanaged | awk '{print $1}'); do echo NM_CONTROLLED=yes | sudo tee -a /etc/sysconfig/network-scripts/ifcfg-$i; done

content.constant_value:
[Unit]
Description=Mount etcd as a ramdisk
Before=local-fs.target
[Mount]
 What=none
Where=/var/lib/etcd
Type=tmpfs
Options=size=2G
[Install]
WantedBy=local-fs.target

ansible_extra_options.description: Extra options string to append to ansible-playbook commands

auth_url.description: The endpoint URL used to connect to OpenStack/PowerVC

chrony_config.description: Set to true to setup time synchronization and setup chrony. Default: false

chrony_config_servers.description: List of ntp servers and options to apply

cluster_network_cidr.description: blocks of IP addresses from which pod IP addresses are allocated.

cluster_network_hostprefix.description: The subnet prefix length to assign to each individual node.

cni_network_provider.description: Set the default Container Network Interface (CNI) network provider

connection_timeout.description: Timeout in minutes for SSH connections

enable_local_registry.description: Set to true to enable usage of local registry for restricted network install.

eus_upgrade_channel.description: Upgrade channel having required version availble for cluster upgrade (stable-4.x, fast-4.x, candidate-4.x, eus-4.x) eg. stable-4.11

eus_upstream.description: URL for OCP update server eg. https://ppc64le.ocp.releases.ci.openshift.org/graph

ext_dns.description: Define the preconfigured external DNS and Load Balancer

fips_compliant.description: Set to true to enable usage of FIPS for OCP deployment.

helpernode_repo.description: Set the repo URL for using ocp4-helpernode

helpernode_tag.description: Set the branch/tag name or commit# for using ocp4-helpernode repo

install_playbook_repo.description: Set the repo URL for using ocp4-playbooks

install_playbook_tag.description: Set the branch/tag name or commit# for using ocp4-playbooks repo

installer_log_level.description: Set the log level required for openshift-install commands

jump_host.description: Jump server hostname/IP to be used for SSH connections

kdump_commandline_append.default: irqpoll maxcpus=1 reset_devices cgroup_disable=memory mce=off numa=off udev.children-max=2 panic=10 rootflags=nofail acpi_no_memhotplug transparent_hugepage=never nokaslr novmcoredd hest_disable srcutree.big_cpu_lim=0
kdump_commandline_append.description: This option appends arguments to the current kdump command line

kdump_commandline_remove.default: hugepages hugepagesz slub_debug quiet log_buf_len swiotlb
kdump_commandline_remove.description: This option removes arguments from the current kdump command line

kdump_crash_kernel_memory.description: The crashkernel memory reservation for kdump occurs during the system boot

kdump_enable.description: Set to true to enable the kdump on Cluster Nodes

kdump_img.description: For specifying image other than default kernel image

kdump_kexec_args.description: For adding any extra argument to pass to kexec command

kdump_log_path.description: The file system path in which the kdump saves the vmcore file

lb_ipaddr.description: Define the preconfigured external Load Balancer

local_registry_image.description: Name of the image used for creating the local registry container.

luks_compliant.description: Set to true to enable usage of LUKS for OCP deployment.

luks_config.description: List of tang servers and thumbprint to apply

luks_filesystem_device.description: Path of device to be luks encrypted

luks_format.description: Format of the FileSystem to be luks encrypted

luks_label.description: User label of luks encrypted partition

luks_name.description: User label of Filesystem to be luks encrypted

luks_options.description: List of luks options for the luks encryption

luks_wipe_filesystem.description: Configures the FileSystem to be wiped

luks_wipe_volume.description: Configures the luks encrypted partition to be wiped

mount_etcd_ramdisk.description: Whether mount etcd directory in the ramdisk (Only for dev/test) on low performance disk

network_name.description: The name of the network to be used for deploy operations

network_type.description: Specify the name of the network adapter type to use for creating hosts

ocp_release_tag.description: The version of OpenShift you want to sync.

openstack_availability_zone.description: The name of Availability Zone for deploy operation

private_network_mtu.description: MTU value for the private network interface on RHEL and RHCOS nodes

proxy.description: External proxy server details in a map of server, port(default=3128), user & password

rhcos_kernel_options.description: List of kernel arguments for the cluster nodes

rhcos_pre_kernel_options.description: List of kernel arguments for the cluster nodes for pre-installation

scg_flavor_is_public.description: Newly created compute template will be private by default. User can set this to true to make it visible in UI

scg_id.description: The id of PowerVC Storage Connectivity Group to use for all nodes

secure_http.description: Flag to enable the secure_http which disables Track/Trace for httpd server.

secure_named.description: Flag to enable the secure_named which limits DNS transfers

secure_nfs.description: Flag to enable the secure_nfs which limits the access of NFS server to the compute/control plane

service_network.description: blocks of IP addresses from which service addresses are allocated.

setup_squid_proxy.description: Flag to install and configure squid proxy server on bastion node

sriov_vnic_failover_vfs.description: Specifies the amount of VNIC failover virtual functions (max. is 6)

ssh_agent.description: Enable or disable SSH Agent. Can correct some connectivity issues. Default: false

sysctl_options.description: List of sysctl options to apply.

sysctl_tuned_options.description: Set to true to apply sysctl options via tuned operator. Default: false

tenant_name.description: The name of the project (a.k.a. tenant) used

upgrade_channel.description: Upgrade channel having required version availble for cluster upgrade (stable-4.x, fast-4.x, candidate-4.x) eg. stable-4.11

upgrade_delay_time.description: Number of seconds to wait before re-checking the upgrade status once the playbook execution resumes.

upgrade_pause_time.description: Number of minutes to pause the playbook execution before starting to check the upgrade status once the upgrade command is executed.

user_name.description: The user name used to connect to OpenStack/PowerVC
